violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by pizza utensils. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Utensils were moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the upstairs bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to create an action to limit activity presence. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. The dipper well was turned on to facilitate flushing of particulates to the drain. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the cold drawer unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the cold drawer unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
